snippet.title: Lehja | Abhi Dutt ft. Faisu & Jannat | Vikram M | Official Video | Romantic Song 2021 | Blive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents the most romantic hindi song of the year "Lehja" sung by Abhi Dutt Featuring Faisu & Jannat Zubair. The lyrics are penned by Azeem Shirazi and the music is directed by Vikram Montrose song directed by Rahul Shetty. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja

#Lehja #Fainat #AbhiDutt #NewHindiSong #LoveSongs2021

Song - Lehja
Composer- Vikram Montrose
Singer - Abhi Dutt
Lyrics - Azeem Shirazi
Song Programmed and Arranged - Vikram Montrose
Song Mixed & Mastered by - Eric Pillai @ Future Sound Of Bombay
Mix Assistant Engineer - Michael Edwin Pillai
Harmoniums - Ali Aslam Shah
Vocals Recorded @ Vikram Montrose

snippet.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2021 : ২য় দফায় রণক্ষেত্র নন্দীগ্রাম, রক্তাক্ত কেশপুর, ভোট পড়ল ৮০%
snippet.description:
নন্দীগ্রামের ভোটকে কেন্দ্র করে তুলকালাম ব্যাটলগ্রাউন্ড বয়াল। প্রায় দু’ঘণ্টা বুথের ভিতরেই রইলেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। বাইরে তখন সম্মুখসমরে তৃণমূল ও বিজেপির কর্মী সমর্থকরা। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেই, একের পর এক ঘটনায় উত্তপ্ত ছিল গোটা নন্দীগ্রাম। ভোট শুরু হতে না হতেই নন্দীগ্রামের মির্জাচকে তৃণমূল কর্মীদের ভোটদানে বাধা দেওয়ার অভিযোগ ওঠে কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনীর বিরুদ্ধে। অন্যদিকে নন্দীগ্রাম এক নম্বর ব্লকে সাত সকালেই বাইক বাহিনীর দাপট দেখা যায়। বাইকে কোনও দলের ঝান্ডা না থাকলেও, বিজেপি অভিযোগ করে, এই বাইক মিছিল করে তৃণমূল। নির্বাচন কমিশনে অভিযোগ জানানো হয়। নন্দীগ্রামের গড়চক্রবেড়িয়ায় লাঠিচার্জ করে জমায়েত হটিয়ে দেয় পুলিশ ও কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনী। পালাতে গিয়ে ডোবায় পড়ে যান এক ব্যক্তি। বুথের আশেপাশে এবং রাস্তায় অবৈধ জমায়েত হঠাতে রাস্তায় নামেন নন্দীগ্রাম থানার দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত আইপিএস অফিসার নগেন্দ্রনাথ ত্রিপাঠী। এদিকে নন্দীগ্রামের ওসমানচকে অন্যের হয়ে ভোট দেওয়ার সময় হাতেনাতে ধরা পড়েন শেখ হানিফ নামে এক ব্যক্তি। সোনাচূড়ার নেতাজি মোড় এলাকায় বুধবার রাত থেকেই শুরু হয়েছিল বোমাবাজি। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেও এলাকায় ছিল আতঙ্কের ছায়া। সব মিলিয়ে এবারের ভোটে সবথেকে চর্চিত কেন্দ্র নন্দীগ্রাম দিনভর ঘটনাবহুল।


#BengalElections2021 #Nandigram #Bayal #MamataBanerjee #SuvenduAdhikari #ABPAnanda #ABPLive

bn.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2021 : ২য় দফায় রণক্ষেত্র নন্দীগ্রাম, রক্তাক্ত কেশপুর, ভোট পড়ল ৮০%
bn.description:
নন্দীগ্রামের ভোটকে কেন্দ্র করে তুলকালাম ব্যাটলগ্রাউন্ড বয়াল। প্রায় দু’ঘণ্টা বুথের ভিতরেই রইলেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। বাইরে তখন সম্মুখসমরে তৃণমূল ও বিজেপির কর্মী সমর্থকরা। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেই, একের পর এক ঘটনায় উত্তপ্ত ছিল গোটা নন্দীগ্রাম। ভোট শুরু হতে না হতেই নন্দীগ্রামের মির্জাচকে তৃণমূল কর্মীদের ভোটদানে বাধা দেওয়ার অভিযোগ ওঠে কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনীর বিরুদ্ধে। অন্যদিকে নন্দীগ্রাম এক নম্বর ব্লকে সাত সকালেই বাইক বাহিনীর দাপট দেখা যায়। বাইকে কোনও দলের ঝান্ডা না থাকলেও, বিজেপি অভিযোগ করে, এই বাইক মিছিল করে তৃণমূল। নির্বাচন কমিশনে অভিযোগ জানানো হয়। নন্দীগ্রামের গড়চক্রবেড়িয়ায় লাঠিচার্জ করে জমায়েত হটিয়ে দেয় পুলিশ ও কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনী। পালাতে গিয়ে ডোবায় পড়ে যান এক ব্যক্তি। বুথের আশেপাশে এবং রাস্তায় অবৈধ জমায়েত হঠাতে রাস্তায় নামেন নন্দীগ্রাম থানার দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত আইপিএস অফিসার নগেন্দ্রনাথ ত্রিপাঠী। এদিকে নন্দীগ্রামের ওসমানচকে অন্যের হয়ে ভোট দেওয়ার সময় হাতেনাতে ধরা পড়েন শেখ হানিফ নামে এক ব্যক্তি। সোনাচূড়ার নেতাজি মোড় এলাকায় বুধবার রাত থেকেই শুরু হয়েছিল বোমাবাজি। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেও এলাকায় ছিল আতঙ্কের ছায়া। সব মিলিয়ে এবারের ভোটে সবথেকে চর্চিত কেন্দ্র নন্দীগ্রাম দিনভর ঘটনাবহুল।


#BengalElections2021 #Nandigram #Bayal #MamataBanerjee #SuvenduAdhikari #ABPAnanda #ABPLive

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.

snippet.title: Shaurya arrives at Girls Hostel to meet Anokhi
snippet.description:
In the serial, Shaurya aur Anokhi Ki Kahani, major twist will make the viewers go aww. The cute moments between the student and the teachers will melt your hearts. Here, Shaurya's feelings for Anokhi has changed and he is in LOVE with her. Shaurya arrives at Girls hostel late at night as Anokhi is not reposnding to his calls and messages. Take a look at the video and find out what will happen next.

snippet.title: PESHAWARI CHAWAL | Pakistan Special Golden Pulao Recipe Cooking in Indian Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
The world has a lot of most tasty pulao recipes with different names like Chana Mewa Pulao, Zaiqa Chawal, and more. Today we cook Pakistan's special Beef Chana Mewa Pulao recipe using mutton instead of Beef.

We use Chana and Dry grapes as the main ingredients for this pulao recipe.

That taste is delicious!

snippet.title: Maharashtra Second Lockdown : 2 एप्रिलनंतर लॉकडाऊनची शक्यता, नवे नियम काय असू शकतात?
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्रात लॉकडाऊन ( Maharashtra Lockdown )लागणार की नाही, अशी धाकधूक लागलेली असतानाच आता एक मोठी शक्यता समोर आली आहे. महाराष्ट्रात 2 एप्रिलपासून ( 2 April 2021 ) लॉकडाऊन लागण्याची तयारी सुरु झाली असल्याची माहिती आहे. मिड डे ( Mid Day ) या इंग्रजी वृत्तपत्राने आपल्या सुत्रांच्या हवाल्याने याबाबतचं वृत्त दिलं आहे. मात्र, हा लॉकडाऊन मागील लॉकडाऊनहून ( Corona Lockdown Again ) काहीसा वेगळा असेल...काहिसा वेगळा म्हणजे नेमका ( Lockdown Guidelines ) कसा हेच आपण आजच्या व्हिडीओत समजून घेऊया

#MaharashtraLockdown #LockdownAgain #LockdownGuidelines

snippet.title: Pawan Kalyan Vakeel Saab Movie Team Interview | Anjali Director Sriram Venu Exclusive Interview ABN
snippet.description:
Pawan Kalyan Vakeel Saab Movie Team Interview | Heroine Anjali & Director Sriram Venu Exclusive Interview | ABN Entertainment 
Vakeel Saab is an upcoming Indian Telugu-language legal drama film directed by Venu Sriram and produced by Dil Raju. A remake of the Hindi film Pink, it stars Pawan Kalyan, Nivetha Thomas, Anjali, Ananya Nagalla, and Prakash Raj.
Pawan Kalyan is an Indian actor, director, screenwriter, stunt coordinator, philanthropist, and politician. His film works are predominantly in Telugu cinema. He is the youngest brother of the popular actor Chiranjeevi. Kalyan made his acting debut in the 1996 Telugu film Akkada Ammayi Ikkada Abbayi.
Anjali is an Indian film actress and model, who predominantly appears in Tamil and Telugu films. Following a stint in modelling, she was cast in starring roles in two Telugu productions; her début film was the Telugu film Photo, before bagging a role and gaining attention in the film Kattradhu Thamizh with Jiiva.
Nivetha Thomas is an Indian actress who appears in Telugu, Malayalam and Tamil-language films. She is best known for Ninnu Kori, Gentleman, Brochevarevarura and Darbar. Thomas made her debut with the 2008 Malayalam film Veruthe Oru Bharya, for which she won the Kerala State Film Award for Best Child Artist.
Prakash Raj is an Indian actor, film director, producer, television presenter, activist, and politician.
Venu Sriram is an Indian film screenwriter and director known for his works primarily in Telugu cinema. In 2011 he directed Oh My Friend. In 2017, he directed MCA. produced by Sri Venkateswara Creations

For More Latest Movie News and Celebrity Updates Stay Tuned to the Channel and Subscribe: Subscribe to Our Channel: https://bit.ly/2PaQ9FU

snippet.title: Indians And Food Delivery || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
For Binomo Education, Click https://bit.ly/3e06HzD  and get Rs.65,000 for Binomo tutorial.
Use "BS132" promo code for +100% on the first deposit. Thank me later!  
Risk Warning! Your capital might be at risk!
Go subscribe to Binomo's Official Instagram Account - https://www.instagram.com/binomo/

India is an amazing country where a food delivery boy beats a girl for complaining about the food but the controversy takes a U-turn when the delivery boy's angle of the story comes in media according to which the girl had created the whole scene to avoid payment. We all order food online and have our sweet and bitter experiences with food delivery guys. Stories like zomato delivery guy eating food, people increasing waiting time in order to claim free food. In the end Zomato and swiggy delivery guys fill our empty stomachs and bring smiles to our faces.
Here we have tried to pick some funny moments of Indians and food delivery guys. We respect the profession and the companies who are in the business. Enjoy the video and next time when you order food say big thanks to the delivery guy because these guys were out when the whole country was in lockdown.
Share the video with your loved ones and spread laughter.
#onlineorder #fooddelivery

snippet.title: Mazhai Mazhai (Video Song) THALAIVI | Kangana Ranaut | Saindhavi Prakash| GV Prakash Kumar| Madhan K
snippet.description:
T-Series Tamil Presenting An official song Mazhai Mazhai from the upcoming Bollywood movie Thalaivi by Saindhavi Prakash, music by G V Prakash Kumar, lyrics penned by Madhan Karky.

THALAIVI chronicles the life and times of the legend – Jayalalithaa! For the first time, the untold story of Amma- the nation’s revolutionary hero is being portrayed on the big screen. The film will showcase Jayalalithaa’s inspirational journey from a 16-year old debutant in the world of Tamil cinema who goes on to become a superstar and eventually becomes Thalaivia revolutionary leader.

The iconic story is being portrayed by the iconic actor Kangana Ranaut. Opposite to her stars Arvind Swami as MGR - Thalaivi’s inspiration, love interest, and mentor.

#Thalaivi #KanganaRanaut #ArvindSwami #GVPrakashKumar #TamilHits #TamilLatestSong

SUBSCRIBE US: http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTamil
-----------------------------
Song: Mazhai Mazhai
Album/Movie: Thalaivi
Artist Name: Kangana Ranaut
Singer: Saindhavi Prakash
Music Director: G V Prakash Kumar 
Lyricist: Madhan Karky

localized.description:
T-Series Tamil Presenting An official song Mazhai Mazhai from the upcoming Bollywood movie Thalaivi by Saindhavi Prakash, music by G V Prakash Kumar, lyrics penned by Madhan Karky.

THALAIVI chronicles the life and times of the legend – Jayalalithaa! For the first time, the untold story of Amma- the nation’s revolutionary hero is being portrayed on the big screen. The film will showcase Jayalalithaa’s inspirational journey from a 16-year old debutant in the world of Tamil cinema who goes on to become a superstar and eventually becomes Thalaivia revolutionary leader.

The iconic story is being portrayed by the iconic actor Kangana Ranaut. Opposite to her stars Arvind Swami as MGR - Thalaivi’s inspiration, love interest, and mentor.

snippet.title: THE SUICIDE SQUAD - Rebellion Trailer
snippet.description:
Thought you might like this too. #TheSuicideSquad
 
https://www.facebook.com/thesuicidesquad
https://www.instagram.com/thesuicidesquad
https://twitter.com/SuicideSquadWB
https://www.thesuicidesquad.com
 
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures’ superhero action adventure “The Suicide Squad,” featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup.
 
Welcome to hell—a.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out—even join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today’s do-or-die assignment?  Assemble a collection of cons, including Bloodsport, Peacemaker, Captain Boomerang, Ratcatcher 2, Savant, King Shark, Blackguard, Javelin and everyone’s favorite psycho, Harley Quinn.  Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.  Trekking through a jungle teeming with militant adversaries and guerrilla forces at every turn, the Squad is on a search-and-destroy mission with only Colonel Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave…and Amanda Waller’s government techies in their ears, tracking their every movement.  And as always, one wrong move and they’re dead (whether at the hands of their opponents, a teammate, or Waller herself).  If anyone’s laying down bets, the smart money is against them—all of them. 
 
The film stars Margot Robbie (“Birds of Prey,” “Bombshell”), Idris Elba (“Avengers: Infinity War”), John Cena (upcoming HBO Max series “Peacemaker,” “Bumblebee”), Joel Kinnaman (“Suicide Squad”), Jai Courtney (the “Divergent” franchise), Peter Capaldi (“World War Z,” BBC’s “Doctor Who” ), David Dastmalchian (upcoming “Dune,” “Ant-Man and the Wasp”), Daniela Melchior (“Parque Mayer”), Michael Rooker (the “Guardians of the Galaxy” films), Alice Braga (“Elysium”), Pete Davidson (“The King of Staten Island,” TV’s “Saturday Night Live”), Joaquín Cosio (“Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse,” TV’s “Narcos: Mexico”), Juan Diego Botto (“The Europeans”), Storm Reid (“The Invisible Man,” “A Wrinkle in Time”, “Euphoria”), Nathan Fillion (“Guardians of the Galaxy,” TV’s “The Rookie”), Steve Agee (“Brightburn,” “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2”), Sean Gunn (the “Guardians of the Galaxy” films, the “Avengers” films), Mayling Ng (“Wonder Woman”), Flula Borg (“Ralph Breaks the Internet”), Jennifer Holland (“Brightburn,” upcoming HBO Max series “Peacemaker”) and Tinashe Kajese (TV’s “Valor,” “The Inspectors”), with Sylvester Stallone (the “Rocky,” “Rambo” and “Expendables” franchises), and Viola Davis (“Ma Rainey’s Black Bottom,” “Suicide Squad”).
 
Gunn (the “Guardian of the Galaxy” films) directs from his own screenplay, based on characters from DC.  The film is produced by Charles Roven and Peter Safran, with Zack Snyder, Deborah Snyder, Walter Hamada, Chantal Nong Vo, Nikolas Korda and Richard Suckle executive producing.
 
Gunn’s creative team includes director of photography Henry Braham (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2”), production designer Beth Mickle (“Captain Marvel”), editors Fred Raskin (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2,” “Once Upon a Time… In Hollywood”) and Christian Wagner (the “Fast & Furious” films) and Oscar-nominated costume designer Judianna Makovsky (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol 2,” “Avengers: Endgame,” “Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone”).  The music is by John Murphy (“Kick-Ass”).
 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents An Atlas Entertainment/Peter Safran Production, A James Gunn Film, “The Suicide Squad.”  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It is set for release nationwide in theaters and IMAX on August 6, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: King - Godfather | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅🔥Follow🤴🏾On Instagram🔥✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking


LYRICS:

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.

Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

Verse1

Main muh utha ke seedha falak nu chumma,
Aaj aane ki ni lod mera naam thaave dhumma,
Munda jawani vich pair rakheya ni poora,
Ghar baar chhadd kalla shehr wich ghumma.
Milla ni mennu kadde koi godfather,
Na koi achhi salah na yara  koi seekh!!
Lo aaj baneya main apna hi father
Mere saare dukh dard maine aapayi karna theek!!

Maine jeetne di aadat ni paali,
Mere jeen da tareeka yara mere ton vi jada dheet!
Fuckk!!! main kadde jooth ni gaana,
Taj meri maa ae baaki thalle aa zamana

Jo mujhe ghaav dere sadiyon se kehte tere apne hain...aaj maine suna ni bahana!!


HOOK

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.
Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

Verse2

Ekko cheez sikhayi sada zindagi hai maa ne
Putt aage badh pichhe vekhi na,
Jo hoya chhad de o beet gaya,
Tu duniya daari de ghulamma baare jada sochi na.
Ye duniya ghutne bhi tek degi
Tu bas maarke ye ghum zinda baatein likhe ja
Imtehaan aur upar wale ka hai rishta purana
Azmaaye tujhe aage dikhe ja.


Dhokebaazaan naal baithke ni khana Kadde baaki mere putt sada mauja lutti ja!
Fuckk!!! main kadde jooth ni gaana,
Taj meri maa ae baaki thalle aa zamana
Jo mujhe ghaav dere sadiyon se kehte tere apne hain...aaj maine suna ni bahana!!

HOOK

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.

Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Ananda Bhavan Episode 60, 02/04/2021 | #VikatanPrimeTime
snippet.description:
Vallamai Tharayo - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKcGe9BTHkrqU79qB4wJs4mOXjM3AzdBg
Ananda Bhavan was a popular serial produced by Vikatan Televistas and aired on Sun TV. Ananda Bhavan portrays the story of a family which runs the hotel named “Ananda Bhavan”. The story revolves around the sufferings and the trials of the family in running the hotel. After Akshaya, #VikatanPrimeTime brings Ananda Bhavan to you!

The old-fashioned story theme of mother-in-law versus daughter-in-law, malice exchanges between the father and the eldest son-in-law, sisters-in-law who refuse to go to their in-laws place even after marriage. The character of the brother who is loving and caring towards his parents and wife are some of the back stories which form the crux of the story for this TV serial. Ananda Bhavan was aired at 9 PM on all weekdays on Sun TV. The cast of Anand Bhavan included Chetan, Delhi Kumar, Satchu, Vanaja, Anand and many more.

20 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been 20 years of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas
Kolangal revolves around the lives of four siblings; the eldest daughter is the main protagonist. It relates the story of these children whose mother taught them to always be straightforward in life.
Subscribe: https://goo.gl/QiBz7h Vikatan App - http://bit.ly/2QvUBTD

en.title: Ananda Bhavan Episode 60, 02/04/2021 | #VikatanPrimeTime
en.description:
Vallamai Tharayo - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKcGe9BTHkrqU79qB4wJs4mOXjM3AzdBg
Ananda Bhavan was a popular serial produced by Vikatan Televistas and aired on Sun TV. Ananda Bhavan portrays the story of a family which runs the hotel named “Ananda Bhavan”. The story revolves around the sufferings and the trials of the family in running the hotel. After Akshaya, #VikatanPrimeTime brings Ananda Bhavan to you!

The old-fashioned story theme of mother-in-law versus daughter-in-law, malice exchanges between the father and the eldest son-in-law, sisters-in-law who refuse to go to their in-laws place even after marriage. The character of the brother who is loving and caring towards his parents and wife are some of the back stories which form the crux of the story for this TV serial. Ananda Bhavan was aired at 9 PM on all weekdays on Sun TV. The cast of Anand Bhavan included Chetan, Delhi Kumar, Satchu, Vanaja, Anand and many more.

20 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been 20 years of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas
Kolangal revolves around the lives of four siblings; the eldest daughter is the main protagonist. It relates the story of these children whose mother taught them to always be straightforward in life.
Subscribe: https://goo.gl/QiBz7h Vikatan App - http://bit.ly/2QvUBTD

snippet.title: Quesadilla Recipe in Tamil | Mexican Recipe in Tamil | Easy Dinner Recipe in Tamil
snippet.description:
In this video we will see how to make quesadilla recipe in tamil. This is simple and easy to make mexican recipe which can served  for dinner. We can use a wide variety of fillings and we can make vag quesadillas or chicken quesadillas. We can also use paneer. Quesadillas can be used as a quick evening snack or can be served as dinner. The melted cheese and crispy crust is absolutely delicious.

#QuesadillaRecipe #MexicanRecipe #DinnerRecipes

Friends, please do try this quesadilla recipe at home and share it with your friends and family. Also please do share your feedback about the recipe in the comments below. All the best and happy cooking!

Ingredients:
1 cup Maida
1 cup Wheat flour
1 tbsp Oil
1/2 tsp Salt
required Water

1/4 kg boneless chicken
2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste
1/4 tsp garam masala
1/2 tsp Cumin powder
1 tsp Chili powder
1 tbsp Oil
Lemon juice
required Salt
2 tbsp Oil for roasting Chicken
1 cup cheese

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 09 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 2nd April 21
snippet.description:
Hit the bell and subscribe to stay connected with Har Pal Geo's collection of Pakistani dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal
Momina Iqbal as Naheed

snippet.title: Mukhtar Ansari ने 16 साल पहले लिया था Yogi से पंगा, आज भुगत रहा खामियाजा
snippet.description:
उत्तर प्रदेश सरकार ने राज्य में लम्बे वक़्त से फल-फूल रहे अपराधियों के गुनाहों का ब्याज सहित हिसाब किताब करने का पूरा मन बना लिया है, और फिलहाल इस राडार पर सबसे पहले नंबर पर है अपराध की दुनिया का जाना पहचाना नाम मुख़्तार अंसारी, अंसारी को अगले 2 हफ़्तों के भीतर पंजाब से उत्तर प्रदेश जेल में शिफ्ट कर दिया जाएगा।  अंसारी के गुनाहों का साम्राज्य तो कई दशकों से बसा हुआ था मगर योगी आदित्यनाथ सरकार में ही उसके खिलाफ कार्रवाई इतनी तेज क्यों हुई? इस सवाल का जवाब है 16 साल पहले अंसारी द्वारा किया गया एक कांड जिसका खामियाजा उसे आज भुगतना पड़ रहा है। जानिये 16 साल पहले क्या हुआ था ?

To Subscribe on Youtube: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/punjabkesaritv

Follow us on Twitter :
https://twitter.com/punjabkesari

Like us on FB:
 https://www.facebook.com/Pkesarionline/

snippet.title: MAGO | Jasmine Sandlas | Official Music Video (Explicit) | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021|
snippet.description:
#MAGO  #JasmineSandlas #LatestPunjabiSong2021

Song Name: MAGO
Lyrics and Singer: Jasmine Sandlas
Director: Rosleen Sandlas
Music: Sharan Shergill & Lil Daku
Mixing & Mastering: Sharan Shergill
DOP & Editor: Guri Bhandal
Colorist: Gobindpuriya
Makeup: Mia Lopez
Artwork: Pawan Lubana

A big shoutout to the ACAMPO STORE!

Available on all Digital Platforms:

Apple Music: https://rb.gy/3hvw0h
Spotify: https://rb.gy/yzkndw
Amazon Music: https://rb.gy/elgwvj
JioSaavn : https://rb.gy/4fqcrp
Gaana: https://rb.gy/jd8scn

Lyrics:
Pull up in the spot in slow mo
Cash flow, lay low, on the top floor
My click is tight, we same old 
Kehnde chaal navabi nale nakhra doabi

In Bollywood, I'm newbie
You love me coz I'm choosy
My life is like a movie
Lately been speaking rupee

So tell me what you want, what you want soneya 
Yea i got it all, got it all soneya
I'm fly with a motherfuckin cherry on top
You aint sayin nothin, DJ turn it up 

All the way, turn in up all the way 
Mitro aa gayi oye 

Gulabi queen in the house now
Looks like its gonna be a shut down
Straight outta Cali 209
I'd be in Punjab at sundown

Aj di raat to baad, sharabi sada naam hi rakhta javega
Fuck it
Je tu dave mera saath, te aj di eh raat zamana dohravega

So tell me what you want, what you want soneya 
Yea i got it all, got it all soneya
I'm fly with a motherfuckin cherry on top
You aint sayin nothin, DJ turn it up 

All the way, turn in up all the way 
Mitro aa gayi oye 

Paya market vich gaah soneya
Godde Godde sareyan nu chaa soneya
Jide naal hove dhuron hi khuda soneya
Kaun rokda tufana de ve raah so

Sona heere moti paisa channa kithe le java
Yes ! I'm the boss baby. I call the shots baby.
Waiting for no body, let me know that you're ready.

Lakk patla patta di bhari, Agayi Oye
Let's get this party started, Agayi Oye
Aj laal mein surkhi la layi
Alcohol rakho jaari 

Mitro aa gayi oye

Pencilmate wants to ship a package to Pencilmiss. Will it get there? 

6:34 - WHAT A CALL 
Pencilmate's waiting for a text back! How can Pencilmiss text so SLOW?!

Have we also mentioned that these burgeres are locally sourced, and completely greenhouse gas friendly? Pencilmate's the ULTIMATE FRY Cook!

Pencilmiss overslept her date! Will she get ready on time?!

Pencilmate has the longest sandwich ever!

Mini Mate loses a tooth! With he finally get to meet the toothfairy?

Pencilmate and Mini Mate play tag but... Mini Mate GOES MISSING?!

Pencilmate tries to fly a toy plane! How far will he get?

Pencilmate finds the best remote! Until Mini Mate gets his hands on it.

snippet.description:
Dream Warrior Pictures Proudly Presents the Video Song of “Jai Sulthan” From Karthi's #Sulthan, Directed By Bakkiyaraj Kannan. #Karthi | #RashmikaMandanna | #BakkiyarajKannan | #VivekMervin | #Anirudh  | #SRPrabhu | #DreamWarriorPictures

Song: Jai Sulthan
Music: VIVEK - MERVIN
Lyrics: Viveka
Singers: Anirudh Ravichander, Junior Nithya & Gana Guna

iTunes:https://music.apple.com/in/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan-single/1552701719?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3t8eTRRkTRs9mxxYWZK9Xz

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/u/j7ooonu7M

*பாடல் வரிகள்*

சண்டையில கீயாத 
சட்டையில்லா குமாரே

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா 
சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே .....
என் தெளலத்மாரே.... 
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என்  அண்ணன்மாரே ....

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே....
என் தெளலத்மாரே ....
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என் அண்ணன்மாரே .....

ஏய் மத்தநாளு கிதான்றதே,சந்தேக கேசே ….
இங்க மன்ஷனுங்க ,எல்லாருமே  காமடி பீசே ...
நீ வாயகட்டி  வயத்தகட்டி ,சேக்காத காசே ...
சோறு துண்ணும்போது விக்கிச்சீனா 
எல்லாம் குளோசே ...

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா....

உனக்குன்னுதான் ,தரவா.. தரவா 
உசுர தரவா..
கலக்குறியே சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா …தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே,என் தெளலத்மாரே ...
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் ,என் அண்ணன்மாரே...


ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் குந்தல்,
நிக்கல் குந்தல்
நிக்கலு  குந்தல்
நிக்கலு குந்தலு 

சபா டேய் ....
வயசாகுது  டா...
அய்யயோ …
அடங்கமாட்டீங்களா டா …

டேய்..
ஹே ஊரில் ரொம்ப பெரு 
மூஞ்ச உத்து பாரு ,
பூரான் உட்டு இருப்போம் 


மொரட்டு பீஸு …எல்லாம் ….
உருட்டு கட்டையால…
பொரட்டி …போட்டி …எடுப்போம் 
ஊய் ..சொக்கா மாட்டிகினு 
சோலி பாக்க …போனா 
தொக்க ஆல …புடிப்போம் 
பீடா போட்டமேறி …வாய கோயப்பிட்டு 
டாடா காட்டி …வருவோம் 

சம்பவம் செய்யும் வேலைய எல்லாம் 
அஞ்சாறு வாரம் ஒத்தி போடு ….
வம்புக்கு யாரும் வந்தாலும் கூட …
வள்ளலார் போல வணக்கம் போடு 

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 
உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

வா...சுல்தான்,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 

உனக்குன்னுதான், தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...
தூக்கி சொல்லு….

வா சுல்தான் , வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான் தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டு போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத, சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா ,சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே …

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 31 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Sambhavna Seth on Fights With Rahul Mahajan-Raja Chaudhary, Truce with Rakhi Sawant & more
snippet.description:
Sambhavna Seth Interview: The actress reveals to ETimes TV what's keeping her away from TV and Bollywood.  She says that she hasn't got her due at all. The chat proceeds to dwell on her experiences inside the Bigg Boss house with Rakhi Sawant,  Rahul Mahajan and Raja Chaudhary. Seth is clear that she can never mend fences with the latter two. Even Vindu Dara Singh couldn't succeed in getting her to talk to Raja again. She also talks about  Bigg Boss 14 and calls it largely boring. It's quite an emotional Sambhavna you will see here. What are you waiting for? Click on the video above!

snippet.description:

https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000113524#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3135: Popatlal Gets A Special Call
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal gets a call from Pooja, a reporter from Indore who is coming to Toofan Express, Mumbai the next day. She asks him to meet him as she wants to appreciate Popatlal. Popatlal gets excited to meet her as he gets to know that Pooja is also unmarried. Tapu Sena overhears the conversation and wishes Popatlal luck. To know what happens between Popatlal and Pooja, watch the full episode now


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 08 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 2nd Apr 21
snippet.description:
https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Har Pal Geo is now in the USA! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to continue enjoining your favorite Pakistani dramas

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 16 Teaser - 1st April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 16 Teaser - 1st April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Geo is the hub for all your Pakistani entertainment needs! Hit the bell icon and subscribe to become a part of our growing community, now hitting the USA

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Chali Chali (Video Song) THALAIVI | Kangana Ranaut| Vijay | GV Prakash Kumar|Saindhavi |Irshad Kamil
snippet.description:
Presenting an official song Chali Chali from the upcoming Bollywood movie Thalaivi by Saindhavi, music by G V Prakash Kumar, lyrics penned by Irshad Kamil.
THALAIVI chronicles the life and times of the legend – Jayalalithaa! For the first time, the
untold story of Amma- the nation’s revolutionary hero is being portrayed on the big screen.
The film will showcase Jayalalithaa’s inspirational journey from a 16-year old debutant in the
world of Tamil cinema who goes on to become a superstar and eventually becomes Thalaivia revolutionary leader.
The iconic story is being portrayed by the iconic actor Kangana Ranaut.
Opposite to her stars Arvind Swami as MGR - Thalaivi’s inspiration, love interest, and mentor.

#Thalaivi​, Releasing on 23rd April

snippet.title: Manjhi - The Mountain Man | Scene 3 | Nawazuddin Siddiqui | Radhika Apte | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Manjhi – The Mountain Man is a 2015 Indian Hindi-language biographical film based on the life of Dashrath Manjhi. Manjhi, widely known as the "Mountain Man", was a poor labourer in Gehlaur village, near Gaya in Bihar, India, who carved a path 9.1 metres (30 ft) wide and 110 metres (360 ft) long through a hill 7.6 metres (25 ft) high, using only a hammer and chisel.

#NawazuddinSiddiqui enacted the role of #DashrathManjhi, while Radhika Apte played Manjhi's wife. The film was released worldwide on 21 August 2015.

#ManjhiTheMountainMan 

Viacom18 Studios Handles :-

Facebook:- https://www.facebook.com/Viacom18Studios/
Twitter :- https://twitter.com/Viacom18Studios
Instagram:- https://www.instagram.com/viacom18studios

snippet.description:

Let us explore this amazing hypothesis in this episode of AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

snippet.description:
Bondita feels threatened by Manorama and therefore tries to stop her from singing the prayers for Durga Maa. But Anirudh helps Manorama, thus hurting Bondita. What will Bondita do to seek revenge?

#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: ଏ ମାଟି ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଏ ଜାତି ଓଡ଼ିଆ | E Mati Odisha E Jati Odia | Utkal Divas | Full Video Song | Prem Anand
snippet.description:
ଆମେ ଗର୍ବିତ ଆମ ମାଟି ପାଇଁ 
ଆମେ ଗର୍ବିତ ଆମ ଜାତି ପାଇଁ

This Utkal Divas Watch E Mati Odisha E Jati Odia
Watch the Full Video Song of E Mati Odisha E Jati Odisha. Amara Muzik is the Official Music Label of E Mati Odisha E Jati Odisha.

ନିର୍ମାତା
ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଓ ଓଡିଶା ବାସୀ

ଆମ ପାଇଁ ଗର୍ବ ଓ ଗୌରବ
ମହାମହିମ ରାଜ୍ୟପାଳ ପ୍ରଫେସର ଗଣେଷୀ ଲାଲ୍
ମାନ୍ୟବର ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ନବୀନ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ

ବିଶେଷ କୃତଜ୍ଞତା 
ଜି ଏସ୍ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ 
ପଦ୍ମଶ୍ରୀ ସୁଦର୍ଶନ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ
ପଦ୍ମଶ୍ରୀ ଦିଲୀପ ତିର୍କି 
ଦେବାଶିଷ ମହାନ୍ତି 
ଦୁତୀ ଚାନ୍ଦ 

ପରିକଳ୍ପନା 
ଶାଶ୍ଵତୀ ଆଚାର୍ଯ୍ୟ 

ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ
ଜୟା ବିଶ୍ବାସ

ସଙ୍ଗୀତ
ପ୍ରେମ୍ ଆନନ୍ଦ୍

ଗୀତିକାର 
ବସନ୍ତ ରାଜ ସାମଲ 

କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ 
ହ୍ୟୁମାନ ସାଗର
ଅନନ୍ୟା ଶ୍ରୀତମ ନନ୍ଦ
ଆଶୁତୋଷ ମହାନ୍ତି
ଶ୍ରୀ ଚରଣ ମହାନ୍ତି 
ସବିଶେଷ ମିଶ୍ର
ଶଶାଙ୍କ ଶେଖର
ପ୍ରଜ୍ଞା ପ୍ରସ୍ମିତା ହୋତା
ବିଶ୍ୱଜିତ୍ ମହାପାତ୍ର
ଦେବକୃପା ମିଶ୍ର
ଅଳକା ଅଭିଲେଖା
ସମୀକ୍ଷା ମିଶ୍ର
ଲୋପାମୁଦ୍ରା ଦାଶ
ଶ୍ରୀୟା ମିଶ୍ର
ସୋନମ୍ ଦାଶ

ଅଶେଷ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ
ଦିଲୀପ ସାହୁ 
ବିଦେଶୀ ଦାସ 
କୈବଲ୍ୟ ମହାନ୍ତି

ଆମେ ଗର୍ବିତ ଆମ ମାଟି ପାଇଁ 
ଆମେ ଗର୍ବିତ ଆମ ଜାତି ପାଇଁ

This Utkal Divas Watch E Mati Odisha E Jati Odia
Watch the Full Video Song of E Mati Odisha E Jati Odisha. Amara Muzik is the Official Music Label of E Mati Odisha E Jati Odisha.

ନିର୍ମାତା
ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଓ ଓଡିଶା ବାସୀ

ଆମ ପାଇଁ ଗର୍ବ ଓ ଗୌରବ
ମହାମହିମ ରାଜ୍ୟପାଳ ପ୍ରଫେସର ଗଣେଷୀ ଲାଲ୍
ମାନ୍ୟବର ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ନବୀନ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ

ବିଶେଷ କୃତଜ୍ଞତା 
ଜି ଏସ୍ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ 
ପଦ୍ମଶ୍ରୀ ସୁଦର୍ଶନ ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ
ପଦ୍ମଶ୍ରୀ ଦିଲୀପ ତିର୍କି 
ଦେବାଶିଷ ମହାନ୍ତି 
ଦୁତୀ ଚାନ୍ଦ 

ପରିକଳ୍ପନା 
ଶାଶ୍ଵତୀ ଆଚାର୍ଯ୍ୟ 

ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ
ଜୟା ବିଶ୍ବାସ

ସଙ୍ଗୀତ
ପ୍ରେମ୍ ଆନନ୍ଦ୍

ଗୀତିକାର 
ବସନ୍ତ ରାଜ ସାମଲ 

କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ 
ହ୍ୟୁମାନ ସାଗର
ଅନନ୍ୟା ଶ୍ରୀତମ ନନ୍ଦ
ଆଶୁତୋଷ ମହାନ୍ତି
ଶ୍ରୀ ଚରଣ ମହାନ୍ତି 
ସବିଶେଷ ମିଶ୍ର
ଶଶାଙ୍କ ଶେଖର
ପ୍ରଜ୍ଞା ପ୍ରସ୍ମିତା ହୋତା
ବିଶ୍ୱଜିତ୍ ମହାପାତ୍ର
ଦେବକୃପା ମିଶ୍ର
ଅଳକା ଅଭିଲେଖା
ସମୀକ୍ଷା ମିଶ୍ର
ଲୋପାମୁଦ୍ରା ଦାଶ
ଶ୍ରୀୟା ମିଶ୍ର
ସୋନମ୍ ଦାଶ

ଅଶେଷ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ
ଦିଲୀପ ସାହୁ 
ବିଦେଶୀ ଦାସ 
କୈବଲ୍ୟ ମହାନ୍ତି

snippet.title: क्या है Tapu Sena का Plan? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah- तारक मेहता - Ep 3134 - 31st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000113272#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3134: What Is Tapu Sena's Plan?
---------------------------------------------------------
Tapu Sena has a samosa party at Gogi's house. while having a samosa party Gogi pranks Tapu Sena. after their party they go to the society compound and there they meet Popatlal. Popatlal invites Tapu Sena to his house for dinner on Sunday but they deny it as they get only Sanday to spend time with their full Family. Popatlal feels sad for not having family so Tapu Sena plans to Surprise Popatlal. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
